dimensions.note: Docs-only change: reworded the 'returned no Account' error-table row in README.md. No credential resolution or secret handling touched.
No logging calls changed; the only source edit is the model version bump and a no-op upgrades entry.

No control flow changed. Verified the doc claim against code: the empty-Account throw at the accountId check fires only when send() succeeds with an empty Account; expired-SSO/network failures throw out of send() and propagate as-is. README now describes it accurately.
Docs and a no-op version bump; existing typecheck, unit, quality, and dry-run gates continue to cover the extension.
No method semantics changed; verify remains a read-only guard that writes verified context only after checks pass.
STS command class and response-field mapping unchanged; no request/response shape touched.
No new files, handles, or network clients; STS client cleanup path in the finally block is unchanged.
Manifest and exported model version aligned at 2026.07.19.0; no files added to the package surface.
Mechanical schema/write review: no schema or writeResource payload change; strict globalArguments and context schema retained.
Resource lifetime (infinite) and garbage-collection settings unchanged.
No new CRUD surface introduced; the existing single verify method set is unchanged by a docs edit.
Existing check behavior unchanged; the version bump and no-op upgrade do not bypass verification.
Mechanical instance-name review: no writeResource instance-name logic changed; context resource naming preserved.
No readResource or dataRepository access patterns changed.

Added a no-op 2026.07.19.0 upgrade entry (upgradeAttributes returns old unchanged) so stored instances advance to the bumped model version with no globalArguments migration. Invariant holds: every version has a corresponding upgrade step.
